ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the record entry */,
  "service_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the service */,
  "application_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the application */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* Percentage of CPU usage */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Amount of memory used */,
  "disk_usage" REAL /* Amount of disk space used */,
  "network_in" REAL /* Incoming network traffic */,
  "network_out" REAL /* Outgoing network traffic */,
  "metric_category" TEXT /* Category of the metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timestamp")
)

CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  "service_description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the application */,
  "application_name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "application_description" TEXT /* Description of the application */,
  "application_type" TEXT /* Type of application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_categories" (
  "category_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the metric category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the metric category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_definitions" (
  "metric_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "category_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the metric category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for the metric category
Unique identifier for the metric category
